name: My City Horse Stable
author: Poki
description: My City Horse Stable is a simulation game where you can raise, ride, and care for your very own horse! Manage your own stable, groom and train your horse, and even take part in exciting races. Dress up your adorable steed, explore the stables, and enjoy the full horse-riding experience, just like in real life! Yeeeeeeeee Haaaaaaa! How to play My City Horse Stable? Click or tap to make the choice! Who created My City Horse Stable? My City Horse Stable is created by My Town Games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play My City Horse Stable for free? You can play My City Horse Stable for free on Poki. Can I play My City Horse Stable on mobile devices and desktop? My City Horse Stable can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
